evals.name: MVP SRS, non-technical client
evals.prompt: I have a client who wants an application to manage electric vehicle charging stations. It's an MVP, and the client is not technical at all. They want users to be able to find a station, reserve it, and pay for it. On the admin side, it needs to be possible to manage the stations and view stats. Write me the SRS.
evals.expected_output: Quick-tier SRS adapted to a non-technical audience, with user stories, an executive summary, an extensive glossary, no technical jargon, and mockups/diagrams where relevant

evals.name: Technical SRS, internal team
evals.prompt: We need to specify the authentication module for charging-station. Stack: React + Node.js + PostgreSQL. We want OAuth2 with Google/Apple, magic link by email, and role management (admin, operator, user). This is an internal document for the dev team. EARS + Gherkin for the acceptance criteria.
evals.expected_output: Standard-tier SRS oriented toward the dev team, EARS for the requirements, Gherkin for the acceptance criteria, references to existing code, detailed security NFRs with metrics

evals.name: Regulated tender SRS
evals.prompt: Write an SRS for a monitoring system for medical IoT devices (Class IIa). The system collects sensor data, analyzes it in real time, and alerts the care staff. This is for a tender; the document must be exhaustive and standards-compliant. The client is a hospital.
evals.expected_output: Deep-tier SRS with all IEEE 29148 sections, formal shall statements, FMEA, traceability matrix, regulatory compliance (MDR, IEC 62304), exhaustive NFRs with SLA
